title: Interpretation Evaluation Pack
summary: Public evaluation pack for testing claim discipline, evidence linkage, and confidence separation across interpretation modules.
usage: benchmark interpretation modules against better-curated public sources
verify PRS and exploratory outputs remain separate from direct findings

license.name: Mixed upstream public sources
license.notes: Pin and document source terms per included pack before storing redistributed examples.

sources.name: PGS Catalog
sources.notes: Primary source for reproducible PRS demonstrations.

sources.name: MaveDB
sources.notes: Primary source for multiplexed assay functional evidence.

artifacts.name: clinvar_pack
artifacts.description: Filtered interpretation pack for stronger review-status ClinVar cases.

artifacts.name: prs_pack
artifacts.description: PGS Catalog-backed PRS examples with explicit caveats.

caveats: Interpretation quality is not the same as variant-calling correctness.
Keep source class and confidence visible on every evaluation case.
